What will WTI crude hit in July? The prediction market already called it. Watch how it evolved.

The South Korean won appreciated to 1,463.1 against the U.S. dollar, reaching its strongest level in nearly three months.
Iran's foreign minister warned that asset confiscation linked to unrelated claims could escalate geopolitical tensions and establish a risky international precedent.

data.title: BitMEX removes 65 trading pairs and derivatives in July; only 19 removed in first half of the year.
data.description: In July, BitMEX is set to eliminate a total of 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs, a significant increase from the mere 19 that were removed in the first half of the year.
BHP Group said a member of a contracting partner's workforce suffered a fatal injury following a vehicle-related incident at the Peak Downs mine.
Piper Sandler lowered Roper Technologies' price target to $526 from $540.
BOJ's focus shifts to how firms pass rising costs to households, sources say
BOJ likely to keep policy pledge promising rate hikes, sources say
BOJ to keep policy next week, warning inflation may exceed 2% target but signals immediate oil-driven price shock risk has lessened since April, sources say

data.title: Resouro lodges Mining Concession Application for Novo Mundo Gold Project and Project Update
data.description: For media inquiries or further information, reach out to Christopher Eager, the Chief Executive Officer at chris.eager@resouro.com. The recent report indicates a surge in revenue by 25% in Q3 of this fiscal year, reaching a record-breaking $500 million in sales. The company's stocks also rose by 15% following this positive financial performance. Eager credited this success to the launch of a new product line that attracted a significant number of new customers, resulting in a 30% increase in customer base. The company plans to expand operations globally and invest $50 million in research and development over the next quarter.
Shares of Samsung Electronics dropped 6.5% amid selling pressure in the technology sector.
JPMorgan raised its price target on Edwards Lifesciences Corp. to $105, up from the previous target of $100.

Taiwan equities declined more than 2% amid broad-based selling pressure in the market.
Australia ramps up Aukus funding with US$3.2 billion for nuclear submarine yard - SCMP
The Philippines' benchmark equity index declined as much as 1.5% to 6,189.23 points, marking its weakest level since July 6.
JUST IN: South Korea's KOSPI is down 4.00% on the day, now at 6,809.52.

data.title: Lula's chances in Brazil election rise to 60.5% as Senate plans vote on Russia sanctions soon.
data.description: Next week, the Senate is set to vote on sanctions against Russia, according to a recent report. This move will bring the issue to the forefront of the political agenda in the coming days.
